raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Eptitâ padeſmitâ Gad- 
dâ Pekaüſa Reinaſius 
Debla/tappe Akas Jo- 
tama ta Kehnixa no Juha 
Dehls par Kehnixu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Diwiđesmits Gaddus wez̆ 
bija Akas/ kad wiſch par Kehni- 
nu tappe/ un waldija feſchpadeſ- 
mits Gaddus Jeruſalemê/ un ne 
darrija/ kaſt tam KUNGAM fa- 
wain Deewam patike/ ittin ka 
wiṣna Tehws Dahwids.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo wiſch ſtaigaja us to 
Iſraëta Kehnixu Zelkeim. 
Wiſch liſke arridsan jawu Deh- 
lu zaur Ugguni eet/ pehz to Pa- 
gazu Negantibahm / ko tas 
KINGS Iſraëta Behrnu 
Preekſcha bij iſdsinnis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiſch uppureja un kweh- 
pinaja arridsan us Angſtumeem 
un Pakalneem/ un appaſch wiſ- 
feem fatteem Rohkeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad zehlehs Rezinstas Sihr- 
rexiu Kehnixsch ar Pekaüſu Reina- 
ſius Dehlu/ to Iſraëta Kehnixu 
us Jeruſalemi Kaṙā/ un tee 
mette Lehgeri apfahrt Akafu/ 
bet tee ne warreja to pahrwarreht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tanni Laikā atdabbuja 
Rezins tas Sihreru Kehnixsch
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Akas fuhttia Wehſt- 
neschus us Tiglat Pileſteru to 
Affireeu Kehnixu/ un likke faz- 
ziht: Es efmu taws Kalps un 
taws Dehls/ nahz augſcham/ un 
atpeſti mann no to Sihreru Keh- 
nixa Rohkas/ un no ta Iſraëta 
Kehnixa Rohkas/ kas pretti man 
zeblutchees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Akas rehine to Sudra- 
bu un Seltu/ kaṣ eekſch ta KUN- 
GA Namma/ un eekſch ta Keh- 
nixa Namma Mantahmatraſts 
ktua/ un fuhttia tam Affireeu 
Kehnixam Dahwanas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Affireeu Kehnixsch 
paklaufija tam/ un tas Affireeu 
Kehnixsch zehlahs augſcham us 
Damafku/ un uſnehme to/ un 
aiswedde tohs (WeDſihwota- 
jus) uhs Kiru/ un nokawe Die- 
zinu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad zehlehs tas Kehnixsch 
Akas Tiglat Pileſteram tam Af- 
fireru Kehnixam pretti us Da- 
masku. Un redseja tur ween- 
Altari/ kaṣ Damaskuṣā btja/ un 
tas Kehnixsch Akas fuhttia tam 
Preesteram Urijasam ta Altar- 
Siymi/ un wiṣna Lihdsibu/ wi- 
schki ta/ ka tas bija darrihts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Preesteris Urija- 
ustaifija tahdu Altari/ ittin ta- 
du/ kaḣdu tas Kehnixsch Aka- 
no Damaskus bij fuhtijs/ ta da- 
rijas Preesteris Urijas/ fame- 
Bbbb
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
